name: Mrs. Comfort Enders, M.Ed
bio: Mrs. Enders founded KFI with a vision to provide values-driven education that balances academic rigor with character formation. She provides strategic leadership across programs and community engagement.

name: Jonathan Enders, B.Sc
bio: Jonathan oversees curriculum development, teacher training, and program delivery from Early Years through Upper Elementary. He leads KFI's academic improvement initiatives.

name: Benjamin Geeton, M.A.
bio: Benjamin manages daily school operations, student welfare, and supports teachers to ensure high-quality classroom instruction and a safe learning environment.
